title: Assorted Discoveries
description: Experience Minecraft like never before with new blocks, items, foods, and much much more with Assorted Discoveries!
body:
![A picture showing cattails, witch's cradle, bog blossom, and blueberry bush's!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aPbDj9i2/images/f2e15dd1ed465659242785cbfd671133e9afcb43.png)

![An image of colored campfires. As well as a zombie plushie, skeleton plushie, enderman plushie, and a blaze plushie, and rope ladders and colored lanterns!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aPbDj9i2/images/1237f76e007dcfd9f8e2b1089247d0f3e181af43.png)

## Description

Welcome to Assorted Discoveries! This is a mod built for fabric that has always been about creating a modded experience that blends seamlessly with vanilla Minecraft. Each new item, block, and food has been carefully considered as to how well they fit into the original game. I hope that through my mod, you can find new features that you always wished Minecraft would add. Any of these features can also be disabled easily through the config as well!

## Features:

- New crops and dynamic planter boxes.
- Rope ladders of every wood type that can hang from blocks.
- Lots of new foods (including cakes and pies).
- Colored lanterns, campfires, and torches.
- Plushies of nearly every mob in the game!
- A new bouncy mushroom type.
- A new plant that releases particles.
- Rabbits can fall further before taking damage.
- And tons of new blocks as well as a few new variations for existing blocks.

## FAQ:

**Can I add this mod to my mod pack?**

- Of course! I would love to see Assorted Discoveries included in your mod packs.

**Can I use this mod in my videos?**

- Of course!

Note: The config screen is designed exclusively for editing the local config file, the one in the .minecraft folder, on your computer. So for servers its recommended to directly edit the config file that is generated in your server after running Assorted Discoveries for the first time!

## Download Dependencies:

- [Fabric API (Latest) (Required)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config API (Latest) (Optional)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Mod Menu (Latest) (Optional)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

![An image of a big purple mushrooms, ender grass, blood kelp, and cindersnap bush!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aPbDj9i2/images/e13178cfc92b04dcfb99951bfd9ac839102a9aab.png)

![An image of blackstone tiles with twisted and weeping ones mixed in. As well as many cat plushies, bauxite bricks with mossy bauxite bricks mixed in, and oak planter boxes, spruce planter boxes, and dark oak planter boxes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aPbDj9i2/images/e38b608b24786e94a55a970fc9cdc419c2330c2d.png)
